text.title: Laravel Layered Patterns (Controller → Service → Resource) Examples
text.summary: Worked example: migrate OrderController from 600-line fat to layered.

example.context: Laravel 11 commerce app; OrderController.php is 612 lines with 8 methods; each method 70-90 lines with inline validate + DB::transaction + raw response + inline auth.
example.walk: Step 1: audit → 8 fat methods, 8 inline validations, 8 raw responses, 8 inline auth checks, 6 controller-tx. Step 2: extract OrderService (create, update, cancel, ship, refund methods) — each wraps DB::transaction. Step 3: generate StoreOrderRequest / UpdateOrderRequest / CancelOrderRequest / etc. Step 4: OrderResource explicit fields; OrderPolicy with create/update/cancel/refund rules; AuthServiceProvider registers; authorizeResource in __construct. Step 5: re-audit → 0 violations; CONTRIBUTING.md updated with layering rules + PR template includes layering checklist.
example.output: OrderController reduces to ~120 lines (8 methods × 15 lines avg); business logic isolated; auth centralized; new endpoints follow the same shape.
